operator: a NOT BETWEEN b AND c
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_time DateTime, description String);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, toDateTime('2024-01-01 10:00:00'), 'New Year Event'), (2, toDateTime('2024-01-02 12:00:00'), 'Second Day Event');
SELECT id, event_time, subtractSeconds(event_time, 5000) AS adjusted_time FROM test_dates WHERE adjusted_time NOT BETWEEN toDateTime('2023-12-31 23:59:59') AND toDateTime('2024-01-02 12:00:00');
SELECT id, subtractSeconds(event_time, 86400) AS subtract_24h FROM test_dates WHERE subtract_24h NOT BETWEEN toDate('2023-12-31') AND subtractSeconds(toDateTime('2024-01-02 12:00:00'), 60);

WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates) AS total_events, (SELECT MAX(event_time) FROM test_dates) AS max_time SELECT id, event_time, adjusted_time, total_events FROM (SELECT id, event_time, subtractSeconds(event_time, 3600) AS adjusted_time FROM test_dates) WHERE adjusted_time NOT BETWEEN toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00') AND max_time;
CREATE TABLE test_edge_cases (id UInt32, event_date Date, event_string String);
INSERT INTO test_edge_cases VALUES (1, toDate('2024-01-01'), 'Event 1'), (2, toDate('2024-01-02'), 'Event 2');
SELECT id, event_date, subtractSeconds(toDateTime(event_string), 100) AS new_time FROM test_edge_cases WHERE new_time NOT BETWEEN toDateTime('2023-12-31 23:59:59') AND NULL;

WITH (SELECT MIN(event_date) FROM test_edge_cases) AS min_date SELECT id, subtractSeconds(min_date, 10000000) AS extreme_subtract FROM test_edge_cases WHERE extreme_subtract NOT BETWEEN '2000-01-01' AND toDate('2025-01-01');
